en: Update check failed. Please try again later.
zh: 检查更新失败，请稍后再试。
逆时针 / 顺时针旋转

en: OpenEnlarge is free, open-source software that brings the darkroom to your desktop. Instead of flipping a tone curve, it inverts every scan in the density domain with the Kodak Cineon model (a Beer-Lambert dye model — density is linear in dye concentration): it samples the film base once per roll to strip the orange mask and neutralize the scanner light in one step, measures the density range inside your crop, then prints each channel back to a positive — with white balance applied as a gain on the print so shadows stay neutral. From there you finish on top with full curve, color-grading, and tonal controls, all in one fast workflow.
zh: OpenEnlarge 是一款免费、开源的软件，将暗房搬到你的桌面。它不是翻转色调曲线，而是在密度域中反相每一张扫描：采用柯达 Cineon 模型（基于 Beer-Lambert 染料模型——密度与染料浓度成线性关系），每卷采样一次片基，一步去除橙色片基并中和扫描光源；在你的裁剪范围内测量密度范围，再将每个通道打印回正片，并以增益方式对正片施加白平衡，使暗部保持中性。随后用完整的曲线、调色与色调控件进行精修，全部在一套流畅的工作流中完成。

en: OpenEnlarge is built with these projects.
zh: OpenEnlarge 基于以下项目构建。

en: Remove it from OpenEnlarge, or also move the original file to the Trash.
zh: 从 OpenEnlarge 中移除，或同时将原始文件移至回收站。

en: Its {count} image{plural} will be removed from OpenEnlarge, or also moved to the Trash.
zh: 其中的 {count} 张照片将从 OpenEnlarge 中移除，或同时移至回收站。

en: They'll be decoded — negatives inverted, positives kept as-is — then opened in Develop.
zh: 它们将被解码——负片反相、正片保持原样——然后在显影中打开。
应用设置到全部 {count} 张照片？

en: The copied tone & color adjustments will replace those on the selected images.
zh: 复制的色调与颜色调整将替换所选照片上的对应设置。
已应用设置到 {count} 张照片
没有可导出的已显影照片。

en: No developed frames in this folder yet.
zh: 此文件夹中还没有已显影的胶片。
光标处 sRGB 8 位强度

en: Skips JPGs that sit beside a raw file of the same name (camera or scanner previews), so only the master file is imported.
zh: 忽略与同名 raw 文件并存的 JPG（相机或扫描仪预览），只导入主文件。
选择一个包含照片的文件夹

en: Revert all metadata to the original EXIF
zh: 将所有元数据还原为原始 EXIF

en: ⚠ Low-confidence film-edge color — tap the swatch to repoint
zh: ⚠ 片边颜色置信度低 — 点按色块重新取样

en: Sets white balance. Click something that should be neutral gray in the final photo.
zh: 设置白平衡。点击最终照片中应为中性灰的区域。

en: Texture is a fine-detail effect — view at 100% to preview the real result (it can't be judged at fit).
zh: 纹理是细节锐化效果——请在 100% 下预览实际效果（适应窗口时无法准确判断）。

en: Use the Point Color dropper to add samples.
zh: 使用点颜色吸管添加样本。

en: Paint over dust/scratches — your strokes show as a red mask instead of healing live. Click ‘AI erase’ to reconstruct them all at once with the MI-GAN model.
zh: 在灰尘/划痕上涂抹——笔迹会显示为红色蒙版而不是实时修复。点击“AI 擦除”用 MI-GAN 模型一次性重建。

en: Paint the spots to remove — they show as a red mask. Then click AI erase.
zh: 涂抹要去除的斑点——它们会显示为红色蒙版。然后点击 AI 擦除。

en: Scroll to resize · click or drag to erase dust · ⌘Z to undo
zh: 滚动调整大小 · 点击或拖动以擦除灰尘 · ⌘Z 撤销

en: Higher sensitivity flags more (and smaller) spots as defects. Lower it if real detail is being removed.
zh: 灵敏度越高，标记的瑕疵越多（也越小）。如果真实细节被去除，请调低。
正在检查 AI 模型…

en: Download the local AI models (~{mb} MB) to auto-detect and remove dust & hairs on-device.
zh: 下载本地 AI 模型（约 {mb} MB），在设备端自动检测并去除灰尘和毛发。

en: Runs local AI models on your device (no upload). Use the sensitivity slider if it removes too much or too little.
zh: 在本地设备上运行 AI 模型（不上传）。如果去除过多或过少，请使用灵敏度滑块。

en: Cycle background histogram: live, frozen, off
zh: 切换背景直方图：实时、冻结、关闭

en: Sets highlights & contrast (D_max). Click the brightest, fully-exposed film leader — the clear bright strip at the start or end of the roll.
zh: 设置高光与对比度（D_max）。点击最亮、完全曝光的片头——胶卷首尾的透明亮条。
{label} 色相与饱和度：色相 {hue}，饱和度 {sat}

en: Enter to apply · Esc to discard · Shift locks the ratio
zh: 回车应用 · Esc 取消 · Shift 锁定比例

en: Point your camera's tether app at this folder.
zh: 将相机的联机拍摄软件指向此文件夹。

en: Stored locally. Used only for the AI Enhance tool.
zh: 仅本地保存，仅用于 AI 增强工具。

en: Add your OpenAI API key in Settings.
zh: 请在设置中添加 OpenAI API 密钥。

en: Re-imagines the preview to reduce noise, dust and scratches. Result is a creative interpretation, not a faithful restoration, and is preview-only.
zh: 重新生成预览以减少噪点、灰尘和划痕。结果为创意性再生成，并非忠实修复，且仅用于预览。

en: Matches white balance, contrast and saturation to the reference's color toning. Drag Strength to taste. Fully local — fine-tune any slider afterward, or undo (Ctrl+Z) to revert.
zh: 将白平衡、对比度和饱和度匹配到参考图像的色调。拖动“强度”调整程度。完全本地处理——之后可微调任意滑块，或撤销（Ctrl+Z）还原。

en: Download the local upscaler (~{mb} MB) to enable on-device super-resolution.
zh: 下载本地放大器（约 {mb} MB）以启用设备端超分辨率。

en: This image is already 8K or larger on its longest side, so upscaling won't add detail.
zh: 该图像最长边已达到或超过 8K，放大不会增加细节。

en: Runs a local AI model on your device (no upload). Output is capped at 8K on the longest side; best results come from smaller sources.
zh: 在本地设备上运行 AI 模型（不上传）。输出最长边上限为 8K；较小的原图效果最佳。

en: Share anonymous usage data — no images, no personal information, just which features are used and your app version. You can change this anytime in Settings.
zh: 分享匿名使用数据——不含图像、不含个人信息，仅包括所用功能和应用版本。你可以随时在设置中更改。

en: Anonymous usage data only. No images or personal information are ever sent.
zh: 仅匿名使用数据。绝不发送任何图像或个人信息。

en: Drag a rectangle on the image to zoom in.
zh: 在图像上拖动矩形以放大。
覆盖 {count} 张已编辑的胶片？

en: Some frames in this roll already have edits. Applying to the whole roll will replace them.
zh: 本卷中部分胶片已有编辑。应用到整卷将覆盖它们。
